id.question: Gatherloop itu tempat apa ya ?
id.answer: Gatherloop adalah board game cafe, tempat main board game bareng keluarga, pasangan, atau teman sambil menikmati makanan dan minuman.

id.question: Kalau gak tau cara mainnya bagaimana ?
id.answer: Tenang saja, game master kami siap merekomendasikan game yang cocok dan mengajarkan cara bermainnya.

id.question: Perlu pesan makan atau minum kah untuk main ?
id.answer: Tidak kok. Mau main saja boleh, mau nongkrong sambil makan dan minum saja juga boleh.

id.question: Boleh bawa makanan atau minuman dari luar kah ?
id.answer: Demi kenyamanan bersama, mohon tidak membawa makanan atau minuman dari luar.

id.question: Selama bermain, boleh ganti game gak ? atau hanya satu game ?
id.answer: Boleh. pelanggan bebas memainkan semua game sepuasnya sesuai durasi bermainnya.

id.question: Boleh membawa game sendiri kah ?
id.answer: Boleh. Namun tarif bermain kami tetap berlaku selama bermain di Gatherloop.

id.question: Bolehkah game master bermain dengan kami ?
id.answer: Mohon maaf, game master hanya bertugas memandu dan tidak ikut bermain dengan pelanggan.

id.question: Ada tempat buat merokok gak ?
id.answer: Ada. kami menyediakan area outdoor khusus bagi pelanggan yang ingin merokok.

en.question: What kind of place is Gatherloop?
en.answer: Gatherloop is a board game cafe, a place to play board games with family, your partner, or friends while enjoying food and drinks.

en.question: What if I don't know how to play?
en.answer: No worries — our game masters are happy to recommend a game that suits you and teach you how to play.

en.question: Do I need to order food or drinks to play?
en.answer: Not at all. You can come just to play, or just to hang out with food and drinks — either way works.

en.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
en.answer: For everyone's comfort, please don't bring outside food or drinks.

en.question: Can I switch games while playing, or is it just one game?
en.answer: You can switch games freely — play as many games as you like within your play time.

en.question: Can I bring my own game?
en.answer: Sure. Our play rate still applies while you're playing at Gatherloop.

en.question: Can the game master join in and play with us?
en.answer: Sorry, game masters are only there to guide — they don't join in as players.

en.question: Is there a smoking area?
en.answer: Yes, we have a dedicated outdoor area for guests who want to smoke.
